edge_hypothesis: ema_rsi_atr has been stagnant at PF ~1.03 because it was ALWAYS tested with conservative R:R (~1.5:1 to 2:1). The validated universal principle — extreme R:R works with quality signals — has never been applied to this template. ema_rsi_atr is uniquely positioned for extreme R:R because it has a BUILT-IN ATR volatility gate (ATR > 20-bar ATR moving average). This gate ensures we only enter when volatility is EXPANDING — exactly when markets make large directional moves. EMA9/EMA21 alignment provides trend confirmation, RSI provides momentum zone filtering, and the ATR expansion gate ensures we're entering during high-energy market conditions. When all three agree AND volatility is above average, the resulting trades should have heavy tails. The hypothesis: applying 6-10x TP to entries that already pass a volatility expansion filter will produce the same PF uplift seen in MACD (1.03→1.46) and Supertrend (1.26→1.91). Win rate will be 15-25% but each winner captures a full volatility expansion wave. Regime assumption: TRENDING (EMA alignment required). Invalidation: if PF < 1.0 even with extreme R:R, the EMA crossover signal lacks the signal quality needed despite the ATR gate — confirming it's structurally weaker than MACD/Supertrend.

variants.name: ema_rsi_atr_vol_rider_6to1
variants.description: EMA9/21 trend + RSI momentum zone + ATR expansion gate with 6:1 R:R. The conservative extreme variant. RSI bands slightly tightened (42-68 long, 32-58 short) to improve signal quality over default. 2.0x ATR stop provides safe floor per doctrine (>=1.5x mandatory), 6.0x ATR TP matches the R:R that made MACD 1h succeed (PF=1.46). This is the baseline extreme R:R test for ema_rsi_atr.
entry_long: EMA_9 > EMA_21 confirms bullish trend alignment.
RSI_14 between 42 and 68 confirms bullish momentum without overextension.
ATR_14 > 20-period ATR moving average confirms volatility expansion.
entry_short: EMA_9 < EMA_21 confirms bearish trend alignment.
RSI_14 between 32 and 58 confirms bearish momentum without oversold bounce risk.
ATR_14 > 20-period ATR moving average confirms volatility expansion.
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
exit_rules: Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (6.0x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (2.0x ATR).
Hypothesis failure mode: if PF < 1.0, ema_rsi_atr signal quality is insufficient even with ATR gate
risk_rules: Stop loss at 2.0x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 6.0x ATR_14 from entry.

components.notes: EMA_9 vs EMA_21 — trend direction confirmation
RSI_14 in 42-68/32-58 — momentum zone filter, tightened for quality
ATR_14 > 20-bar MA — volatility expansion gate + 2.0x stop / 6.0x TP

variants.name: ema_rsi_atr_vol_rider_8to1
variants.description: EMA9/21 trend + RSI momentum zone + ATR expansion gate with 8:1 R:R. Standard RSI bands (40-70 long, 30-60 short) — same defaults as template but with extreme R:R. This matches the R:R that made Supertrend ultra-relaxed achieve PF=1.91. More permissive RSI generates more trades to offset lower win rate at 8x TP. The 2.0x stop keeps risk bounded.
entry_long: EMA_9 > EMA_21 confirms bullish trend alignment.
RSI_14 between 40 and 70 confirms bullish momentum (standard range).
ATR_14 > 20-period ATR moving average confirms volatility expansion.
entry_short: EMA_9 < EMA_21 confirms bearish trend alignment.
RSI_14 between 30 and 60 confirms bearish momentum (standard range).
ATR_14 > 20-period ATR moving average confirms volatility expansion.
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
exit_rules: Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (8.0x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (2.0x ATR).
Hypothesis failure mode: if PF < 1.0 at 8:1 but PF > 1.0 at 6:1, the ema_rsi_atr signal tail distribution caps out between 6-8x ATR
risk_rules: Stop loss at 2.0x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 8.0x ATR_14 from entry.

components.notes: EMA_9 vs EMA_21 — trend direction confirmation
RSI_14 in 40-70/30-60 — standard momentum zones, max trade generation
ATR_14 > 20-bar MA — volatility expansion gate + 2.0x stop / 8.0x TP (matching supertrend success R:R)

variants.name: ema_rsi_atr_precision_10to1
variants.description: EMA9/21 trend + TIGHT RSI momentum zone + ATR expansion gate with 10:1 R:R. The precision variant: very tight RSI bands (45-60 long, 40-55 short) ensure only the highest-quality momentum signals pass. At 10:1 R:R, we need each entry to be a genuine trend initiation, not a random fluctuation within the momentum zone. The tight RSI acts as a second quality filter alongside the ATR expansion gate. Wider stop (2.5x) gives more room for 4h bars to develop. Win rate will be ~10-15% but each winner = 10x risk.
entry_long: EMA_9 > EMA_21 confirms bullish trend alignment.
RSI_14 between 45 and 60 confirms early-stage bullish momentum (tight quality filter).
ATR_14 > 20-period ATR moving average confirms volatility expansion.
entry_short: EMA_9 < EMA_21 confirms bearish trend alignment.
RSI_14 between 40 and 55 confirms early-stage bearish momentum (tight quality filter).
ATR_14 > 20-period ATR moving average confirms volatility expansion.
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
exit_rules: Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (10.0x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (2.5x ATR).
Hypothesis failure mode: if PF < 1.0 with tight RSI + 10x TP, ema_rsi_atr lacks the tail depth for extreme harvesting — cap R:R at 6-8x
risk_rules: Stop loss at 2.5x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 10.0x ATR_14 from entry.

components.notes: EMA_9 vs EMA_21 — trend direction confirmation
RSI_14 in 45-60/40-55 — very tight momentum zones for maximum signal quality
ATR_14 > 20-bar MA — volatility expansion gate + 2.5x stop / 10.0x TP (extreme tail harvest)
